narrative_summary:
# Discharge Summary Draft

## Executive Summary
Jane Smith (DOB 02/20/1985) was hospitalized from 03/01/2026 to 03/05/2026 for Principal diagnosis: Pneumonia, Hypertension. The patient received IV antibiotics and oxygen; clinically improved. Assessment: Pneumonia, Hypertension. At discharge the patient was in Patient discharged in stable condition. Follow-up plan: Primary care follow-up in 1 week. Patient should maintain scheduled outpatient care as documented.
